mapper.select:
SELECT job.id_ as id_, job.type_ as type_, job.handler_type_ as handler_type_, job.handler_cfg_ as handler_cfg_, job.exception_msg_ as exception_message_, job.create_time_ as create_time_, job.element_id_ as element_id_, job.process_instance_id_ as process_instance_id_, job.proc_def_id_ as proc_def_id_, def.key_ as key_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RU_DEADLETTER_JOB as job LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_PROCDEF as def ON job.proc_def_id_ = def.id_
LEFT JOIN ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT as dep ON def.deployment_id_ = dep.id_
AND job.create_time_ >= #{startedAfter}
AND def.deployment_id_ IN ( SELECT id_ FROM ${prefix}ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT ORDER BY deploy_time_ DESC LIMIT #{latestDeployments} )
ORDER BY job.create_time_ DESC
